context: Evaluates the implementation of the 'Infrastructure-Module' (IM) and its relationship with the 'Business-Module' (BM) according to the Dependency Inversion Principle and 'Wiring' instructions of MIM.

checklist.name: IM/BM Folder Separation
checklist.description: The Infrastructure and Business code is explicitly split into folders or namespaces named 'IM' and 'BM'.

checklist.name: IM depends on BM
checklist.description: The Infrastructure code (IM) depends on the Business code (BM). Specifically, the IM's repository implementation imports the BM's interface.

checklist.name: DI Wiring outside BM
checklist.description: Dependency Injection wiring (e.g., factory, DI container, manual wiring) happens in the IM or a module-level entry point, not inside the BM's service.

checklist.name: Strict BM Technical Isolation
checklist.description: The 'BM' section contains NO technical dependencies like database libraries or framework-specific controllers.
